name: Synbio International, Inc.
business: The company develops AI-powered methods for early screening and diagnosis of medical conditions, and sells nutraceutical products, including an anti-anxiety supplement called Healing Force - Anxiety Relief (HFAR).

exposures.sentence: NHYF aims to enhance patient outcomes and reduce healthcare costs by developing cutting-edge AI-powered methods to aid in the diagnosis of medical conditions.
The company is poised to launch an anti-anxiety product - the first of its nutritional supplements that can be added to medical protocols for the longterm management of anxiety.

catalysts.event: Feasibility study for AI-powered facial analysis technology (FDI) for PTSD screening
catalysts.sentence: The initial feasibility study will consist of approximately 60 patients, followed by a validation study of approximately 300-500 patients.

catalysts.event: Launch of anti-anxiety product Healing Force - Anxiety Relief (HFAR)
catalysts.sentence: The Company will promote and sell a natural, food-based anti-anxiety product, known as Healing Force - Anxiety Relief (HFAR).
